text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the day of the Osaka Hai. Having heard about
Sakura Chiyono O's situation, Yaeno Muteki
declares to Mejiro Ardan that her victory is
assured.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Inferring from Yaeno Muteki's words that she
means to make this the ultimate race for Sakura
Chiyono O's sake, Mejiro Ardan makes a clear
show of both her delight and her competitive
spirit.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Pledging to show their friend that they can all surpass their limits together, Mejiro Ardan and Yaeno Muteki get ready to race.
